intro_sentences.es-ES: Vamos a estudiar sol y mar.
intro_sentences.fr-FR: Étudions le soleil et la mer.

sample_sentences.en: We spent the afternoon at the beach.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Nós passamos a tarde na praia.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Pasamos la tarde en la playa.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Nous avons passé l'après-midi à la plage.

sample_sentences.en: The sun is strong at noon.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O sol está forte ao meio-dia.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El sol está fuerte al mediodía.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le soleil est fort à midi.

sample_sentences.en: The sea looks calm this morning.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: O mar parece calmo esta manhã.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El mar parece tranquilo esta mañana.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: La mer semble calme ce matin.

sample_sentences.en: The waves are perfect for surfing.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: As ondas estão perfeitas para surfar.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Las olas están perfectas para surfear.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Les vagues sont parfaites pour surfer.

sample_sentences.en: The sand is warm under our feet.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: A areia está quente sob nossos pés.
sample_sentences.es-ES: La arena está tibia bajo nuestros pies.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Le sable est chaud sous nos pieds.

sample_sentences.en: She packed her swimsuit for the trip.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Ela levou seu maiô para a viagem.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ella llevó su bañador para el viaje.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Elle a emporté son maillot de bain pour le voyage.

sample_sentences.en: Put on sunscreen before going outside.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Passe protetor solar antes de sair.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Ponte protector solar antes de salir.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Mettez de la crème solaire avant de sortir.

sample_sentences.en: A small boat is near the shore.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Um pequeno barco está perto da costa.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Un pequeño barco está cerca de la orilla.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: Un petit bateau est près du rivage.

sample_sentences.en: The child found a shell in the sand.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: A criança encontrou uma concha na areia.
sample_sentences.es-ES: El niño encontró una concha en la arena.
sample_sentences.fr-FR: L'enfant a trouvé un coquillage dans le sable.

sample_sentences.en: My towel is drying in the sun.
sample_sentences.pt-BR: Minha toalha está secando ao sol.
sample_sentences.es-ES: Mi toalla se está secando al sol.
